sportshub

Real camera tester — Windows + Linux

Local only

Live Previews (in this browser)

Plug in Mevo Start or any USB webcam → click Scan → see actual video here

This uses your browser's native camera access (getUserMedia). Works great for Mevo Start in Webcam mode and normal USB webcams on both Windows and Linux.

Server Cameras (RTMP pipeline)

These are the devices the backend can stream via MediaMTX / RTMP

Raw devices from the system are listed below. Click "Start RTMP Stream (local)" to activate a clean path (cam0, cam1...) which can then be used for GameChanger. Active ones show the clean path + "Use for GameChanger" button.

GameChanger Live

Push one camera directly to GameChanger (no OBS). Must have an active local stream (cam0 etc.) first.

If you paste a full URL here, it will be used and the two fields below will be ignored.
"Start RTMP Stream" uses the Go backend + MediaMTX. It will download MediaMTX + ffmpeg on first use (~150MB). The resulting RTMP URL (e.g. rtmp://127.0.0.1:1935/cam0) can be used in VLC, OBS, or GameChanger.
